universal_criteria.check: Exactly one playbook from routes: was read and followed
Topic is one of [user-research, survey-design, user-testing, prototyping]
The decision the research informs is stated before the method
Every non-obvious claim carries one Alfa-core tag; one family only
Each [SUPUESTO] is paired with a concrete verification step
Deliverable ends with an explicit, owned next step
No client PII; no invented prices or benchmarks-as-fact; single brand

user-research: Personas (<=4) are research-backed with a source per attribute
Empathy maps cover all four quadrants (Say, Think, Do, Feel)
Journey map includes at least one negative-sentiment stage and a moment of truth
Each opportunity is owned and prioritized, not orphaned
Qualitative and quantitative findings reconciled, not averaged
survey-design: Every item: single construct, balanced scale, non-leading stem
n, response rate, and margin of error reported with each number
No mean reported on an ordinal scale (top-box or median used)
Findings segmented before concluding and tied to the decision
user-testing: Tasks goal-framed with no solution leakage
Success judged against pre-set criteria and a time/step ceiling
Findings rated severity x frequency with verbatim evidence
prototyping: Fidelity matches the question being tested (no gold-plating)
Lowest rung that can falsify the assumption was chosen
Unhappy/edge states represented, not only the happy path
Tested with a real user or proxy before raising fidelity
